data.fix_hint: Query returned zero SEC filing excerpts. This indicates either the retrieval search failed to find documents or no indexed material matched the query. To resolve: (1) Verify NVDA (NVIDIA) filings are indexed in the system (check most recent 10-K, 10-Q, 8-K); (2) Try a simpler query like "NVDA revenue" or "NVIDIA earnings"; (3) Specify a fiscal period/year (e.g., "NVDA FY2025 revenue") to narrow scope; (4) Check if document indexing/upload succeeded. Note: Forward-looking 2026 projections may not exist in historical filings—focus on trailing/current period results instead.
